nasb.text: And He told them a parable, saying, “The land of a rich man was very productive.

esv.text: And he told them a parable, saying, “The land of a rich man produced plentifully,

cnv.text: 就對他們講了一個比喻，說：“有一個富翁的田地豐收。

ccb.text: 耶稣又讲了一个比喻，说：“有一个富翁，他的田里大丰收，

csbs.text: 然后对他们讲了一个比喻，说：“有一个富有的人，田地丰收了。
